title: Gowin: add and test DFF init values

features.name: register initialization at declaration
features.description: Code should include a register declaration with an initial value assigned at declaration time using the = operator

features.name: sequential logic with non-blocking assignment
features.description: Code should include an always block triggered on positive clock edge using non-blocking assignment to update a register

features.name: DFFS primitive instantiation with SET pin
features.description: Code should include a DFFS (D Flip-Flop with Set) primitive instantiation that connects to CLK, D, Q, and SET pins
